scripts.build: npm run prebuild && tsc && npm run copy-web
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='../../node_modules/electron'; const dest='node_modules/electron'; if(!fs.existsSync(dest)){try{fs.mkdirSync('node_modules',{recursive:true});fs.symlinkSync(src,dest,'dir')}catch(e){console.error('symlink failed:',e)}}"
scripts.sign:verify: codesign --verify --verbose=4 "$(find release -name '*.app' -type d)" && spctl -a -v "$(find release -name '*.app' -type d)"
